path: Problem: Retrieve an intersecting value from a 2D table using a row identified by multiple criteria and a column identified by a header label
Action: INDEX with two MATCH functions; use concatenation in MATCH to create a multi-criteria row lookup (array evaluation)

Observation: When the row key is defined by more than one field (e.g., Work + Material), concatenating the criteria and the corresponding columns allows MATCH to find the correct row; a second MATCH locates the correct category column by header text
